source_pr.title: infoschema: remove t.Run to fix unstable test
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: Weizhen Wang <wangweizhen@pingcap.com>

<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #32004

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: infoschema: remove t.Run to fix unstable test | tk.MustQuery("select query_time, conn_id from `CLUSTER_SLOW_QUERY` order by time limit 1").Check(testkit.Rows("4.895492 6")) (infoschema/cluster_tables_test.go)
failure_signature: infoschema: remove t.Run to fix unstable test | tk.MustQuery("select query_time, conn_id from `CLUSTER_SLOW_QUERY` order by time limit 1").Check(testkit.Rows("4.895492 6")) (infoschema/cluster_tables_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The infoschema cluster-tables tests were structured as one top-level test with many `t.Run(...)` subtests sharing the same suite state (mock servers, failpoints, and other globals). This made the suite sensitive to ordering and leftover state between subtests. This PR stabilizes the suite by removing the `t.Run` subtest structure and turning them into independent tests with explicit setup/teardown, reducing shared-state interference.
fix_pattern: Avoid sharing mutable suite/global state across subtests; split `t.Run` subtests into independent tests (or ensure strict teardown/reset) so each test has clean setup/cleanup.

evidence: evidence: infoschema: remove t.Run to fix unstable test | tk.MustQuery("select query_time, conn_id from `CLUSTER_SLOW_QUERY` order by time limit 1").Check(testkit.Rows("4.895492 6")) (infoschema/cluster_tables_test.go)
